Olalo is an [[initiation order]] which is thought of as the sequence of [[ola]] followed by [[Alo (initiation order)|alo]].

It is considered the path of [[apotheosis]] to [[kamihood]] via the [[Covenants]] followed by the creation of one's own universe as a [[kami]].
[[Category:Initiation orders]]
[[Category:Kami]]
[[Category:Nonduality]]
[[sn:Olalo]][[Category:Ascension]]
[[sn:Olalo]][[sn:Olalo]][[sn:Olalo]]{{Alo}}
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
